name: ltads-state
question: What is the LTADS state of this project: permanent/temporary/legacy/none, session id, and status?

schema.state: one of: none, permanent, temporary, legacy, incomplete_temp, broken

fallback: Check if ltads/ exists; read ltads/config.json for temporary flag; read ltads/sessions/current-session.md for Status field; run git ls-files ltads/ for tracking status.

provenance.note: Formalized from the state detection logic originally embedded in session-start.ps1/sh (the inline 'first oracle' of ULDF).
